name: little-backup-box
desc: Turns a Raspberry Pi into a mobile backup and media management hub. Backs up files from cameras and/or storage devices to local drives and/or the cloud, aggreg…
descFull: Turns a Raspberry Pi into a mobile backup and media management hub. Backs up files from cameras and/or storage devices to local drives and/or the cloud, aggregates multiple sources and can forward them for processing. View, rate, and selectively share your media on the go, including to social networks.
